summary: CSS z-index bug fix testing completed. Price ticker (data-testid='price-ticker-compact') is now visible and positioned correctly above the hero section on both desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). The fix adding 'relative z-40' to LivePriceTicker.jsx line 45 works correctly. All CTA buttons are clickable and navigation works. Admin tabs regression check passed.
passed_tests: Price ticker (data-testid='price-ticker-compact') is visible on desktop (1920x1080) - ticker at y=0, height=38
Price ticker (data-testid='price-ticker-compact') is visible on mobile (390x844) - ticker at y=0, height=38
Price ticker is positioned ABOVE the hero section (ticker.bottom=38 <= hero.top=38) - no overlap
Price ticker has z-index=40 (verified via getComputedStyle)
Price ticker has position=relative (verified via getComputedStyle)
Hero section has z-index=auto (no explicit z-index, lower than ticker)
Navbar has z-index=50 (higher than ticker z-40, as expected)
No layout shift when scrolling - ticker scrolls with page (not fixed)
Hero section content is fully visible and not clipped
CTA 'Join Free Beta Access (Limited Spots)' button is visible and clickable - navigates to /register
CTA 'View Live Metrics' button is visible and clickable - navigates to /leaderboard
Beta spots counter shows 'Spots Remaining: 48' (beta spots available state)
Trust bar visible with all 4 trust items
Live Metrics Terminal visible on desktop
Hero title and description visible on mobile
Admin tabs regression check passed - all 9 tabs functional (Overview, Users, Subscriptions, Logs, Features, System Tools, Security, Waitlist, Sub Health)
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSS z-index fix verified. LivePriceTicker.jsx line 45 has 'relative z-40' class. Ticker is at y=0, hero starts at y=38. Navbar is z-50 (fixed), ticker is z-40 (relative), hero has no explicit z-index. Beta spots remaining=48 (spots available state). To test 'beta full' state, BETA_SPOTS_TOTAL env var would need to be changed.

verified_fix.change: Added 'relative z-40' to compact ticker container className
